title: Audio Generation (TTS) Flow
interaction_flow_generate: PendingAudioGeneration → Ai: Ai::fakeableAudioProvider($provider) [foreach provider in list]
AiManager → AiManager: audioProvider($name) → instance($name) [validates AudioProvider interface]
alt FailoverableException → event(ProviderFailedOver) → continue to next provider
interaction_flow_queue: alt audioIsFaked == true → Ai::recordAudioGeneration(new QueuedAudioPrompt(...)) → return QueuedAudioResponse(FakePendingDispatch)
GenerateAudio → PendingAudioGeneration: [same flow as generate() above]
key_relationships: Audio static-facade → PendingAudioGeneration: creates via Audio::of()
Audio static-facade → Ai: delegates fake/assert methods
PendingAudioGeneration depends_on Ai: calls fakeableAudioProvider(), audioIsFaked(), recordAudioGeneration()
AiManager implements InteractsWithFakeAudio trait: fakeAudio(), audioIsFaked(), fakeAudioGateway()
AiManager extends MultipleInstanceManager: instance($name) resolves provider driver
AudioProvider interface: audio(), audioGateway(), useAudioGateway(), defaultAudioModel()
GenerateAudio implements ShouldQueue: holds PendingAudioGeneration, calls generate() on handle()
FakeAudioGateway replaces real AudioGateway when faked via useAudioGateway()

method_signatures.AiManager::audioProvider: audioProvider(?string $name): AudioProvider  // throws LogicException if not AudioProvider
method_signatures.AiManager::fakeableAudioProvider: fakeableAudioProvider(?string $name): AudioProvider  // swaps gateway if faked
method_signatures.GenerateAudio::handle: handle(): void  // calls pendingAudio->generate(provider, model) via withCallbacks

defaults_and_config.provider_resolution: Provider::formatProviderAndModelList() supports Lab enum, array, or string

failover_logic: generate() iterates provider list; catches FailoverableException, fires ProviderFailedOver event, continues to next provider; throws last exception if all fail
fake_mode_notes: queue() short-circuits when faked: records QueuedAudioPrompt, returns QueuedAudioResponse(FakePendingDispatch). generate() uses fakeableAudioProvider() which clones provider with FakeAudioGateway injected.
